title: Memory Entity Deduplicator
context: ZEUS detected duplicated/corrupted memory entities such as Moradia_Moradia_Boavista. Entity names use underscores as token separators. Preserve original casing where possible.
requirements: Use inline exported functions only: export function normalizeEntityName(input: string): string
Use inline exported functions only: export function detectSuspiciousEntityName(input: string): boolean
Use inline exported functions only: export function deduplicateEntityNames(inputs: string[]): string[]
Do not use export { ... } at the bottom
Do not lowercase names unless explicitly required
